lessons.rule: Do not use 'axios'. Use native 'node:http' or 'fetch' if available. PRD V4 strictly prohibits external HTTP clients to minimize dependencies.
Do not use 'express'. Use 'fastify' for high-performance requirements as per PRD V4.
Before generating any task, confirm that the PRD (Product Requirements Document) is fully loaded and all required sections are defined; otherwise, halt and request the missing PRD content.
